verification_performed.cross_checks: Confirmed single-unit binding (riskClass A, unitCount 1, range RP00.P09.M05.S11) is consistent across policy subphase IDs, service assembler, validators, contract current_subphase, fixture, and validate-script currentContractSubphaseId/required-closed-subphase. Confirmed upstream CP00-092 enforcement (requiredInputFields, five evidence refs, assembler assertion of CP00-092 permission/audit binding decision and risk/severity/go-no-go binding, upstream pack-drift fail-close). Confirmed completion semantics: source_micro_phase_completed true for RP00.P09.M05, phase_completed false for RP00.P09, next_subphase RP00.P09.M06.S01 with next_subphase drift fail-close — no premature phase or RP completion. Confirmed metadata-only no-write/no-runtime posture via forbidden/unknown truthy claim rejection, empty blocked_claim_refs, writesProductState false, module no-write test, and explicit LDIP-implementation fail-close. The only non-zero signal (validate exit 1) is the expected pre-evidence state and not a defect.

risk_bound_single_unit_s11.evidence: Policy binds riskClass A, unitCount 1, range RP00.P09.M05.S11; CONTROL_PLANE_REVIEW_CLOSEOUT_FINDING_ROUTING_MAP_SUBPHASE_IDS=[RP00.P09.M05.S11]; sourceMicroPhaseId RP00.P09.M05, phase RP00.P09. Validator asserts exact pack/risk/range/source/phase bindings; validate script sets currentContractSubphaseId to S11 and requires S11 as a closed subphase. Single-unit scope is consistent across policy, service, validator, contract, fixture, and validate script.

upstream_cp00_092_handoff_enforced.evidence: requestedPackId CP00-092 with requiredInputFields = CP00-092 permission/audit binding result fields and required evidence refs to all five CP00-092 evidence files. Assembler fail-closes on upstream pack drift, missing CP00-092 permission/audit binding decision, and missing risk/severity/go-no-go binding, and asserts the CP00-092 result before emitting CP00-093. correctionReason documents the live sequential-cursor shift from requested CP00-092 to assigned CP00-093, leaving plannedPackId/packId CP00-093 unambiguous.

routing_contracts.evidence: policies.js defines P0/P1/P2/P3 route entries, a severity routing contract, and a P2 disposition contract, plus CONTROL_PLANE_REVIEW_CLOSEOUT_FINDING_ROUTING_MAP_RESULT_FIELDS. Validator assertControlPlaneReviewCloseoutFindingRoutingMapResult validates the result key set and routing contracts; fixture mirror and contract mirror tests confirm the assembler-emitted routing map matches the persisted fixture and contract definition. These are declarative routing-map metadata, not runtime routing/assignment behavior.

no_write_no_runtime_no_human_approval_sy.evidence: no-real-data and no-write flags true; writesProductState false. Assembler fail-closes on every truthy forbidden claim and every unknown truthy claim, explicitly including human approval synthesis/write/bypass, runtime review/queue/assignment/notification, runtime permission/AuthZ/security trimming, audit write, Hermes/command-evidence writes, and database/storage/product-state/idempotency/lock writes. Validator asserts empty blocked_claim_refs and the no-write/no-runtime flags; module no-write test passes. No runtime Claude invocation is introduced — review remains pack-level static.

micro_phase_completion_and_next_cursor.evidence: completesSourceMicroPhase true → source_micro_phase_completed true closes RP00.P09.M05 at its terminal subphase S11; phaseCompleted false → phase_completed false keeps RP00.P09 open (completedPhaseIds [RP00.P08] only); nextSubphase RP00.P09.M06.S01 advances to the next micro-phase. Assembler fail-closes on next_subphase drift and validator asserts source_micro_phase_completed true, phase_completed false, next_subphase RP00.P09.M06.S01. No RP/goal completion is claimed — no premature phase or RP closure.

fixture_contract_test_validator_consiste.evidence: Fixture control_plane_review_closeout_finding_routing_map is generated from the assembler and checked by the fixture mirror test; contract current_subphase RP00.P09.M05.S11, closeout_pack_ref CP00-093, production_ready_flag control_plane_review_closeout_finding_routing_map_verified, and the definition are checked by the contract mirror test; validate script requires the S11 closed subphase and the verified flag. node --check on all five source/test files exits 0, the ESM import exits 0, and all six named tests pass — fixture, contract, validator, and service are mutually consistent.

ldip_planning_only_not_implemented.evidence: Pack is a metadata-only finding routing map (route entries plus severity and P2 disposition contracts) consuming CP00-092 binding output; it introduces no executable LDIP behavior. Assembler explicitly fail-closes on any LDIP-implementation claim, and no-write/no-runtime flags are preserved, confirming planning-only scope with LDIP left unimplemented.
